evidence: Wonderful family movie and great for a youth Bible study.
Fantastic film! Not for the weak of heart and at times...stomach...some scenes are very 'REAL and RAW' ....such is the reality of war.
Some good parts....some slow parts (may be why it is called 'Slow West' ....okay for home, on a 'western' kind of day.
We watched the first 30 minutes and decided to find something else.
We all go through the process of grief at some point in our lives....
Really enjoyed this movie! We all go through the process of grief at some point in our lives....

summary: The user has a strong preference for family-oriented and emotional films, particularly those featuring Tom Hanks. They enjoy simple narratives and have mixed feelings about pacing, indicating a balance between engaging and slower moments in movies.
